note: seq=38: PG-safe pool 32x16 threads via tolerant staggered restart (can't fail on bad-state units). Drops load 4.74->~0.4/core; ~1200/min target, PG-safe.

steps.note: seq=38: PG-SAFE pool re-apply via TOLERANT staggered restart (hard systemd steps were failing on crash-looped units -> rollback deadlock -> load stuck at 4.74/core). 32 procs x16 threads=512 lanes (proven ~1200/min, low load). No PG restart.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS enrichment pool worker (instance %i; PG-SAFE 16-thread)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=ATLAS_WORKER_INSTANCE=%i
Environment=ATLAS_POOL_CONCURRENCY=16
Environment=ATLAS_POOL_CLAIM=32
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=ATLAS_AUTOPULL_CONF=/etc/atlas/autopull.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/enrich/atlas_enrich_pool.py --loop
Restart=always
RestartSec=10
Nice=10
IOSchedulingClass=idle

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
